title: Flaky Romantic Ukrainian Garlic Stir-fry
description: A garlicky and fluffy Ukrainian dish featuring bouquet garni, perfect for a romantic dinner or cozy night in.

ingredients.name: Bouquet Garni (bay leaf, parsley stems, thyme sprigs)

instructions: Prepare the bouquet garni by placing bay leaf, parsley stems, and thyme sprigs in a cheesecloth or fine mesh bag.
Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add garlic cloves and sauté until golden brown, about 3 minutes.
Add chicken broth to the pan with the garlic. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 10 minutes or until most of the liquid is absorbed.
Fold in the bouquet garni, reducing heat if necessary to prevent burning. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the bouquet garni, season with salt, and fold in grated Parmesan cheese. Serve hot over a bed of fluffy white rice.
Garnish with fresh herbs like dill or parsley before serving.
